scripts.storage:link: php -r "$target='storage/imgs';$link='public/imgs';if(is_dir($link)||is_link($link)){echo 'Removendo link existente...'.PHP_EOL;if(PHP_OS_FAMILY==='Windows'){exec('rmdir '.escapeshellarg(str_replace('/', '\\', $link)));}else{exec('rm -rf '.escapeshellarg($link));}}echo 'Criando link simbolico...'.PHP_EOL;if(PHP_OS_FAMILY==='Windows'){$t=str_replace('/', '\\', $target);$l=str_replace('/', '\\', $link);exec(\"mklink /J \" . escapeshellarg($l) . \" \" . escapeshellarg($t));}else{symlink('../'.$target,$link);}echo 'Link criado: public/imgs -> storage/imgs'.PHP_EOL;"
scripts.migrate:fresh: php vendor/bin/phinx rollback -e development -t 0 && php vendor/bin/phinx migrate -e development && php db/seeders/run_seeds.php
scripts.deploy: npm run prod && npm run migrate:fresh && npm run storage:link
